_meta.description: Repo map per enrich_registry.py — paradigma Oracode. Mappa organo_key → (local_dir, github_repo) per attribution grep-by-mission-ID.
_meta.author: Padmin D. Curtis (AI Partner OS3.0) for Fabio Cherici
_meta.purpose: Le mission Oracode Nexus (M-OS3-NNN) toccano paradigma (oracode), enforcement (os3-matrix) e talvolta l'istanza laboratorio storica (EGI-DOC, es. M-OS3-022 relocation). enrich_registry.py greppa l'ID in tutti questi repo.
